title: rupicapnos numidica subsp. erosa
intro: Rupicapnos numidica subsp. erosa, also known as the 'desert catsetum', is a plant species belonging to the family Papaveraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Rupicapnos numidica subsp. erosa include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
